reviews.review_description:
The premise is something like Altered beast where your summoned by a god to do his dirty business,  no other plot given or needed. 
Gameplay
You must do battle in a series of 4 towers each having 10 floors, each floor having more diffuculty ,  every other floor your given a choice of 3 power ups to help you battle the monsters.  A mid boss fight on the 9th floor and a boss fight on the 10th.  Leveling up is key and is there it gets fun as when you are defeated,   and you will be defeated you get to craft and upgrade weapons with items collected.   Crafting is not always guaranteed as it also depends on you using the mallots to hit the weaopon your molding at the right point and tempo.  

You have an option to continue on the latest tower  or start from any previouse tower.     This is satisfy and fun as you get to try out your new weapons, and stack powerups from previous towers and take them to the next tower to fight those enemies,  however if you die,  you loose all your power ups and start with nothing (you still keep your upgrades and weapons though).

The cons:
I did not experience the co-op because I am currently playing this game in 2026 and I could not find any games,  I'm sure if I had some friends  it would be fun.     However once I completed the game ( to my satisfaction)   I was more then happy with my run,  I have a feeling that there is a true ending ,  but I'm not that committed to see it through. 

I wish that moving forward felt normal instead it feels very very flow, which is odd for this arean style of levels.  You can dash forward and backward however,   but when an enemy is just 2 feet away,  its painfully slow approaching them,  sure you can dash,  but you have a limited amount of dashes until they build up.  

Graphics
I'm not sure what to say , its a mix of Western D&D  world with modern day monster assets ,  and then Anime Character.  It all comes together like an Ad filled free-to-play mobile game.    

Conclusion: 
I would recommend this

developer_response.body:
Even though you had to fight a lonely battle without finding any companions in multiplayer, I believe the detailed record you’ve left behind will be like a "god-sent walkthrough" to future players stepping into this game.

Thank you so much for sharing such a thorough and insightful review!

reviews.review_description: Don't waste your money on a game that the creators have given up on the game. I f****d up and payed for a game that will never update and will be gone in 3 months. Kind of f****d up that they still allow you to purchase a failing game that's about to be gone. Not cool.

developer_response.body: There seems to be a misunderstanding. The service is scheduled to end on the PICO platform in three months. Meta has no plans to discontinue the service. Please continue to show your love and support for Darksword.

reviews.review_description: Fun to play but unfortunately the bosses are so bad. When you have to do the same moves over znd over for 30 minutes or just replay the entire round to upgrade weapons it's really dumb. 1 star for completely wasting a game that would have been fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback. We’re very sorry to hear that you experienced inconvenience during the boss battles and weapon upgrade process. We apologize for not being able to deliver an enjoyable experience.

reviews.review_description:
I wanted to like this game. I really did. The character and weapon designs are cool, but unfortunately got very old in the hour that I played this. From lackluster mechanics (like SERIOUSLY slow walking, even with weapons sheathed) to damage sponge bosses, I lost interest pretty quickly. It felt like the game was purposefully padded out, forcing you to level up your weapons (which I could easily buy, due to the game giving me 50 million, yes, 50 million coins, upon launching the game) without giving you a serious reason to. The smithing mechanic was a fun mini game.

The enemies are easy enough to defeat, but the bosses…
They genuinely had me bored. It was the same, “dodge, slash a few times, dodge, repeat”. The armor for the boss regenerates after a few hits on the boss’ health, leaving a feeling of meaningless repetition, rather than an epic boss fight. Not to mention the slowness of walking… it’s annoyingly slow. The bosses can easily whittle your shield and health down because of how slow you are, even with a dash and teleport mechanic. And, I’m not kidding when I say that you can literally wiggle the sword in front of you like a wiimote and it will still do damage.

I’m very disappointed with this game, and wish it wasn’t such a slog to play through. If the mechanics are fixed, I may revisit and edit my review. Until then, it sits firmly at 2/5.

developer_response.body:
We’re truly sorry for letting you down. 🙏
You can adjust the walking speed to be faster in the settings menu, and we’ll make it easier to find in a future update.
We’ll carefully consider your valuable feedback and reflect it in our improvements. Thank you very much for sharing your thoughts with us!

reviews.review_description: Game is good and fun, except when it decides to shut off for no apparent reason, and doesn't let you carry on from where you were. Everytime I'm doing amazingly through the levels, the game just shuts right off. Also, I paid for the season pass and can't seem to get a single point to redeem for a prize. Waste of money

developer_response.body:
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. 🙏
We will review and improve the issue related to the Season Pass rewards.
In addition, we will prepare full compensation so that you can receive your points correctly.
Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback with us!

reviews.review_description: very good game

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you for the great review!

Your support really motivates us to work harder and make an even better game.

reviews.review_title: This is a pretty fun game.
reviews.review_description: i’d say it’s more fun than most console tower games but i’d like a bit more challenge.. make the enemies attack faster please, i can’t help but feel i’m going to beat the game with a rare weapon.. which is kinda stupid because there are two more rarities afterwards.

reviews.review_title: Please fix your game right now.
reviews.review_description:
The game has slow walking mechanics that make the game almost insufferable. The one player stages and multiplayer stages are different and only have three worlds. Please update the game and add faster movement. Also please make your multiplayer comrade be able to go to the lobby with you and do the other worlds with you. If you add these mechanics to the game I am sure that me and many other people will like the game more

I’m trying my best not to hate, I’m really just trying to get you guys to fix your game so it can be better.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to share what would make the game more enjoyable. Your notes on movement, stage flow, and co-op progression are now part of our ongoing review. We appreciate your passion and patience as we evaluate next steps.

reviews.review_description:
Great visuals, i was ready to jump full into this game, but the more I played the more dry and repetitive the combats were. Very little use for skill and strategy. Everytime I lost i knew it was because of my character level and not skill. Made the experience deeply unsatisfactory. 

Take a page from until you fall, infinity blade, and the like. Having a level system is good, but player skill should account for 75% of whether I win or lose. Right now it feels like 10%. Doesn't feel like there's much to get better at. Just a grind.

I really like the game style & visuals, just can't get past the fighting mechanics. It feels like I'm just flayling around and shuffling my feet in old man slippers. the enemies require so many hits I find myself "sword wagging" back and forth. unable to move fast enough for the bow to be effective.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing these impressions. We’ve noted your comments on combat feel and pacing, and they’ll inform our ongoing review. Your perspective helps us refine the experience—appreciate you taking the time to play and provide feedback.

reviews.review_description: When it stays in the game environment its great.  Finally starting to figure things out and on way to get a few points built up, but then it has recently started to jump to augmented reality environment after about the 3rd or 4th round, and I can't get back to the game environment.  No other apps doing this; it is specific to this game.  Result is I can't get anywhere with it.  Have installed all recent uploads that have been offered.  If developers have some trick to keep it from doing this I would appreciate it if they would leave some instructions!

developer_response.body: Hi there. First of all, sorry to hear that. Have you tried pressing the MR toggle button? It's bound to the B button on the right controller. Pressing this button will trigger the Mr mode in the game. I hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Game is awesome everything tip top except multiplayer, i thought as multiplayer we could go through levels together and level up but no its just 3 boss fights, if devs could change this and add more content for multiplay as in a way to level together then id be more then happy to spend money in game, 3 stars just coz of multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying most aspects of the game, but we understand your disappointment with the current multiplayer experience. Your suggestion to expand multiplayer to include co-op progression is valuable, and we’ll take it into consideration as we look for ways to improve the game. We appreciate your honesty and hope you continue to enjoy the other features while we explore potential updates.

reviews.review_description:
Sorry this was the only was I could find to communicate with you. On the first mini-boss Kay, it seems glitched. Even after the boring grind, he is invincible. His shield drains, he loses 20% health, but then every time after that, I drain his shield in about 15 seconds, can't do any more health damage to him and the shield regenerates. I drained his shield over 9 times before he finally killed me. Very frustrating. 

For the actual game. It's not bad. It lacks some of the pace that is enjoyable in "Until you fall." I found the weapons handling good, but like others, the extreme grind needed is silly. A boss should not be impossible to beat even at level 1 if you are good enough. The fact is it's simply impossible to beat until you get to a certain level, and makes the grinding boring because you don't feel like it's skill that you need, just grinding.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! From what we can tell, the Kay level seems to be working as intended, but we understand it can feel challenging. Balancing grind and skill is always a fine line, and your feedback is really helpful as we work to improve the game. We hope you’re enjoying the adventure overall!

reviews.review_title: Hope local dragon demise(no need server)
reviews.review_description: Dash(teleport) for backstabbing and dodge is really cool! Mixed reality mode help me to avoid hand injury. Multiplayer's dragon demise fulfill dragon slayer dream pretty much! Please let this dragon demise can be played locally(no need server)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're delighted you enjoy the dash mechanics and mixed reality mode—it’s great to hear it adds to your experience and keeps things safe. We’re thrilled that multiplayer’s dragon demise fulfills your dragon-slaying dreams! Your suggestion for a local, server-free option is appreciated, and we’ll consider it as we evaluate future updates. Thank you for your support and enthusiasm!

reviews.review_description:
I figured it was finally time to try out this game after kniwing about it since it's release basically. It seems fun mechanically, with full arcade style sword fighting and good mechanics for drawing your weapons that feels good.
Though one thing I've noticed in my short timr with it (I just completed the first elevator) that almost destroys the game's flow is the COMPLETE difficulty imbalance between the regular enemies on floors 1-8 and the bosses. Even the mini-boss on floor 9 is such a difficulty leap that I couldn't hurt him at all my first go-around using the EXACT same weapons I was just killing regular enemies with in 2-4 hits literally on the previous floor...
So I crafted better weapons and upgraded. Now I was literally killing everything in 1 little hit all the way up to the mini-boss. NOW I could hurt him, but it STILL took a short minute. The floor 10 boss took a lot more...
So the difficulty just for the bosses is like a x40-60 difference from the regular canon fodder enemies.
This makes everything but the bosses tedius and basically only good for grinding for the boss fights, and if (when) you die on the bosses, you have to do the 8 floors of 1-hit killable enemies again, which is only good if you WANT to grind exp/ gold/ materials. But here it's forced and feels like a waste of 30+ minutes JUST to retry fighting the boss if you died twice last time (a trademark of roguelikes, I know. I despies rogulikes though).

Outside of that huge blunder in game design/ difficulty scaling, it's still an enjoyable mindless arcade experience. I wouldn't pay more than a huge sale price for it considering it's broken difficulty disparity and that brokeness revolving around 99.9‰ of the entire game's content (battling), but it is worth having for some fun rounds of arena-style monster slaying.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you enjoy the arcade-style combat and weapon mechanics. We understand your concerns about the difficulty jump between regular enemies and bosses. Balancing feedback like yours is important as we continue refining the experience. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy the core monster-slaying gameplay.

reviews.review_description:
Devs choose full MR support instead making separate MR mode. and that was great choice.

This is simply amazing MR game. 

without MR support, it is just good game nothing special.

but with full MR support, it is one of the best MR game in the META store. 

Why not register it in the MR category?

go for it. sales will be doubled for sure. 

absolutely recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the comment! We are pleased to know that you enjoyed our MR mode. It's a pretty simple application but we thought it will have as much impact as you suggest. Hopefully it gets more attention going forward!

reviews.review_description: But you need to nerf the bosses. I took more than one hour to kill the first one (the spider lady) because you do almost no damage and you have less than a second to hit it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game!
We understand that the first boss is indeed difficult to kill early on. One of the tricks is that try to get as many parry as possible (blocking an attack with youre shield when her eyes blink) to maximize your damage chances. Of course, you can always craft or upgrade weapons to make it much easier too! You might also benefit from joining our Discord community at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description:
I've bought about 24 hrs now. I'm at lv. 13 . I've kept wanting to play it & it's been hard to take a break. 

The story mode reminds me of a mortal Kombat game where you climb the ranks to the top.

I have a question: it seems like we do but, I'm double checking... When we earn stuff like (stone skin) of (extra dash) etc it seems like we lose those once we lose on a round & die.
We get slightly diff skill options at times.
 The swords special I can understand losing once you are done with it because it's not necessary.

Why do we have to keep re-earning them? & Not keeping them.

Shouldn't we get to keep our little helper we pick at the end of lv. 4 or 5? It's gone when we reach lv.9 or 10 so we only have it briefly.

Once we complete lv. 10 it should ask us if we want to continue or go home for those who might want to take a break.

I can understand doing 10 rounds at a time. 

I imagined it helps with exercise and stamina plus endurance but once we finish the first 10 rounds we should get the option for a break and keep what we earned. 

Like our gold and weapons collected things of that nature and of course options like stone skin or extra dashes or the random skill upgrade.

Ice, fire, shock or magic added to a sword we don't need to keep but maybe we could keep the spikes for the shield since it is technically an upgrade for equipment that doesn't list ice fire shock or magic.

I made it to lv.4 & died but once I got back to the waiting area & went to the area to pick that part of the game I realized it started having you move on to the next set of 10. 

After passing the queen I thought it was added lvs in the same area.

Oh yeah why do we move sooo slow... It seems to allow ya to move a little faster when ya aren't armed but, then monster can attack unless ya get armed in time. ( Unless that's the point 🤔) Dashing depletes to fast unless ya earn (extra dash) from the skill you pick every other round. 

So I'll be working on the next set of 10 lvs. But we should have a choice to exit for a break or keep going. 

My daughter hopes you open PvP too 😁 we both got this yesterday!!!!!!!!! 

That's all I can think of for now.

developer_response.body:
We are happy that you and your daughter are both having a good time with our game! 

As for your questions, yes, you can resume playing from each Act as long as you complete them once. For instance, once you defeat the boss at level 10 and proceed to the next Act, you can start from the new Act by accessing the mini map at the main lobby area. As for the power up skills, they are temporary buffs that will last per each run. So, everytime you play, you will get different choices of power ups as you proceed. The Merlins should last long as long as they don't die, but yes, they will go home if you manage to complete the Act that you picked them up! Finally, you can increase the movement speed in the settings menu, which you can access at the main lobby area!

For more information, please consider joining our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

Happy holidays!

reviews.review_title: Good but still need more improvement
reviews.review_description:
25 of use atez.me$25 (replace $ with /)

The game is very fun and have many things can add more to make it better 

Need more Co-op content 

And please fix the loading bug before select Play menu it just single player but too long to load start menu

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comments!

The loading issue should no longer happen in the newest build, but we will continue to monitor any unexpected problems! If you haven't yet, please also consider joining our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description:
After deselecting the option to detect items in the room (that appears when you start the game) the game launched without issue. Heads up on that, devs. 

It's very difficult to make combat feel great in VR. A lot of games try it and things end up feeling floaty or you feel like you're just flailing wildly. I'm happy to say that the combat in this game is a blast, which is great because combat is pretty much what you'll be doing when you play. The game also moves surprisingly well for how nice it looks on the Quest 2. Looking forward to playing it with friends. 

I couldn't find a smooth turning option so I hope that is also added at some point.

developer_response.body: Great to hear that it works now! Much appreciate your comments about the game as well. As for the smooth turning option, yes, we currently do not have it but will definitely consider your comments for future updates. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I found bug in Game when the game was finish my quest are accidentally ran out of battery before summary page and after i restart my level was roll back to level 1 and my money to 0 i still have item i found during last play please help me to fix it.

I write review i send email i post in discord no reply about my problem from developer in any channel.

After 5 days developer reply me in discord he tell me to move on and re start again from level 1 so i lost 10 hours of progress and they not responsible at all.

For my last comment i would say don't buy this game because developer did not care about your problem.

If you buy while playing game never let battery die and i wise you don't found problem like me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Darksword.
We are sorry that you had to go through this experience, as the battery save issue was something we did not expect to occur. reviews.review_description: Great game, having a ton of fun leveling up and crafting/upgrading better weapons. Theirs a active discord for those Interested in tips, game suggestions, announcements and coop matchmaking. Highly recommend checking the discord as this game is primarily solo, it's definitely more fun multiplayer messing around.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Yes, you can reach our Discord community channel at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_title: Stunning Game. But Big Fixable Issues.
reviews.review_description:
Off the bat. It's a stunningly beautiful game Art wise. 
The combat is fun and different. I really like the way they went with Sword strikes. Visual effects and efficiency ratings on the blows. It's a nice change from some of the Physics-based games around. (Not every game needs Physics collision)
I haven't gotten far but there are Glaring Huge issues impacting the playability of the game and some of them, other reviews have mentioned.

First of all, It's an old-fashioned mix of Locomotion and teleport. Calling teleports Dashes is lazy. Firstly the teleports are enacted by using the right thumbstick. The same thumbstick used for snap/smooth turns. The issue is that there is no dead zone between turning and teleporting. So 99.9% of the time you want to turn you also use the teleport. It's annoying frustrating and god awful. They either need to add deadzones to the joystick axis between up/down and Left/right or move the "dash" to a button like A (that's only used to continue in scenes for some reason).

Secondly. The locomotion is god awfully slow. It feels like you have a permanent snare on you. My guess is they wanted you to use the "dash" teleport to get on enemies. However, you won't have any charges because you used them all trying to snap turn to the right. Movement speed needs increasing or there needs to be an option in the menu to increase it. 

Realistically what they need to do imho is to increase the movement speed to a normal pace/light jog. Add a slow too movement when the shield is raised and the bow is drawn. Delete the teleport completely and add an actual dash mechanic to the A button that dashes you in the direction you're Moving with the left thumbstick. It would fix the issues and make the game feel so much better. They could add teleport as a comfort option in the menu for movement based on the left thumbstick for people who need it. 

Otherwise a nice fun VR game.
5 stars when fixes are made.

developer_response.body:
EDIT: We now have an option to increase movement speed!

Thank you for playing Darksword!

We appreciate your thoughtful feedback. In fact, I am happy to tell you that our newest update implemented a dedicated teleportation button (to A) and smooth turning, which you can change in the settings menue. Hopefully, these can alleviate some of your concerns.

As for the movement speed, yes, we hear you. However, this is something we are continuously testing as the movement speed is part of the game design, and a potential cause for motion sickness to certain players. Trying to find the right balance may take a little longer, but we will try our best to address this issue as soon as possible.

Again, thank you so much for the review. For more information, please check out our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description:
This is tough to review, but devs need to see complaints/suggestions. I want to love this - the graphics are gorgeous and combat works well. Both are reminiscent of In Death: Unchained (a long-time favorite). (The bow, at least.)

But, my god. That smooth locomotion crawl has GOT to go. I thought other reviews were being a little harsh, but no. Smooth loco might as well not be an option. Either speed it up or stop limiting teleport.

Switching weapons seems a little clunky but I suppose will get better with practice. I have no clue how to summon any of the special weapons I've chosen at the end of the wave. The tutorial, like smooth loco, is barely useful and I would be all over a "tips and tricks" video (hint, hint, YouTubers). 

I agree with another review that more variety of environments wouldn't go amiss, but that doesn't bother me as much as the other things.

For what it is now the price seems a little high. I'm extremely picky with what I buy but I'll keep this hoping the issues I mentioned get fixed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback! I just want to say that we hear you, and that we will continuously try to find ways to make the game better and more fun to play!

reviews.review_description:
(This is more me not having enough space in my room to comfortably move around) but I just feel way to dang slow I know there are dashes but I was not expecting regular movement to be that slow (again if I had more space I could probably be faster) but I kinda just want to maneuver quickly as it would help with getting to/around enemies and bosses but otherwise 5 stars great game
(Also how does coop work?)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Darksword!

We acknowledge that the movement speed may seem slower compared to other games. In fact, this was somewhat intentional as we did not want players to feel motion sickness, and also since the combat area is not as large as those in other games. For the moment, we suggest finding the right balance between regular movement (faster when you unsummon your weapons) and the dash movement would help!

For more information, please check out our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: I am amazed and at the same time happy that more and more creators are starting to use Unreal, the graphics are great, the game mechanics one of the best of its kind! So I recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Yes, we are happy to hear that you are enjoying our game. We will continue our efforts to make the game better and more interesting as we move on!

reviews.review_title: Great fun and a good game to kill time
reviews.review_description: Great game the only complaint i have is if you dont use dash movement walking is very slow

developer_response.body: Thank you! Yes, we realize the movement may seem a bit slow for seasoned VR users. We will try to find a way to offer better options going forward.

reviews.review_description: Best rpg game in VR. Slow movement and teleportation is cool because it doesn't give me any motion sickness.  I don't understand why people complain on movement.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We realize the diverse preferences over the most suitable movement methods in game, and will continue our efforts to provide the best experience possible!

reviews.review_description: Only played for a bit so far, and enjoy it. But we bought it for co-op play. Am I missing something or can I not invite friends? Is co-op just paired with rando's?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game!
Currently the co-op mode does not provide private matching. But, we are in fact working to bring this to the game soon, so please stay tuned!

For more information, please check out our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: This is a must have title if your a fan of HACK AND SLASH non stop ACTION . The combat is smooth visually and gameplay wise. Very fast switching from BOW to SWORD and SHIELD allows for some very interesting combat options. The progression is mildly repetitive but a lot of fun to know that the next time you will get farther after upgrading or crafting the next weapon at your level . Zero complaints from me about this title  . You will get a feeling of gratification completely a stage and going to the next level. Highly recommend this title to anyone who want to feel empowered taking on wave after wave of enemies without bulky weapons that swing odd . Very fast and fluid combat !!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such an awsome review! Glad that you enjoyed playing our game!
We are currently working on new content, features, and improvements to the game so please stay tuned!

For more information, please check out our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: So basically hi devs if your reading and I want to say I love you game but I’m just asking for a discord server and private co op matches and I would like to see some magic and make co op open all the time please and um I love you 😂

developer_response.body: Excited to hear that you are having a good time! Yes, we are working on various things that can improve the current version, so please stay tuned! You can join our Discord channel is https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: I haven't played very many good games on VR most of them are still in the world and RN this is one of the better ones

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We are happy to know that you are having a good time with this one :D For more information, please consider joining our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: I really like the graphics and monsters but there’s a little problem co-op can’t play with ur friends over the world and could u pls add things we’re u can make codes and add and join codes that would be better by:EthanQueen

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for playing Darksword. As for the Co-Op mode, yes, we do have plans to provide private rooms for players to play with their friends! Please stay tuned! You can also get more information about our game at our Discord channel: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: About 1-2 hours in and it is a lot of fun! There are a couple of technical issues I am not sure how to overcome. Once I complete a wave and choose death, the game will not proceed and I have to close it and restart. Luckily I haven't lost anything from the run. Second, I seem to be 10 ft tall! The perfect height seems to be when I am seated but that causes issues while battling. I searched but could not find a way to reset the view/height. If these small items can be overcome then this is a 5 star game and can't wait to see future updates!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game! Yes, we do recognize that there are some unforeseen issues following the launch day. This is why we value your input and will continue our efforts to address user feedback. For more information about the game, we would like to suggest to visit our Discord channel at: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: Great game but I don't like using snap turn. I can't turn correctly because I keep bashing into them instead of turning

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment! We realize that there is a strong need for the smooth turn option and will try to address this as fast as we can. Meanwhile, we hope you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: Make private lobby's other than that I love this game

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 
Our most recent build has many improvements, including private rooms! For more information, please check out our Discord channel: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description:
Fun game enjoyed it a lot. Quit a bit disappointed that after making level 20 and making it to the second boss level. The battery died, and when it charged enough to log in I was back to level 1 and at the tutorial.....to be honest it was not good to see.
A very major bug that needs fixed right away.

developer_response.body: Hello! We are sorry that you had to go through this problem. We are in fact looking into this issue and will address it in the coming update! For more information, please check out our Discord channel: https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: It looks nice, it sounds nice, even voice acting is cool but I can't handle this super slow movement. Teleporting around during combat is strange and it's restricted anyway.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your input! As for the movment issue, we will try to figure out a way to provide more options for users to make the experience more satisfying and fun!

reviews.review_description: Good Graphics und nice immersive feeling. Very challenging und so far one of the games I had the most fun with.

Hello Gl0sulfam!
Thank you for playing Darksword. We are excited to hear that you are having a good time with the game! For more information, please consider joining our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: So good, I just wish different weapons could have special powers. I got this game yesterday and it is one of the best games on my Quest 2

Hi gorilla022,
Happy to hear that you are having fun! We also appreciate your valuable feedback on weapon effects. We are continuously trying to make the game better and more enjoyable, so please stay tuned! For more information, please consider joining our Discord community at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: Co-op is closed. Can you please fix the multi player section so we can play with our group.  This is a really fun game with lots of action. Scary stuff.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your input. We do recognize the need for improving the multiplayer mode for those who would like to play in private. It is something that we are definitely looking at, so please stay tuned for future updates!

reviews.review_description:
Great game.
Seriously i love the graphics and i love every single thing you did, but i may lose interest eventually, and i just joined about a week ago.
There is much more content needed.
The co-op is a bit slow with others and theres many unnecessary lags.
There pvp and field that "will be released" whenever it does, i dont think it may be enough to fill the gap, there is a need for an open world or literally much more doungeons in multiplayer and maybe even raids and clans/guilds option.
You can only have a bow and sword and shield, why not make 4 roles, tank, dps, healer, balanced roles.
I played too many games of rpg and i must say this one have huge potential or else i would not bother to make this review for you developers.
I know testing can be a bish, but common do the gaming community a favor and make us a little world of warcraft TBC version in dark sword, a game to anticipate to go back and play when your at work.
Thanks for the great work on graphic so far, now its time to make a serious update not just mini extension, take a leap and be the best and the one to stay.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for keeping you hanging!
Thank you for your kind words, and I just wanted to mention that we have a Discord channel if you are interested in communicating with other players!
https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: Starts slow but as you upgrade you can defeat bosses in 3 seconds as I have

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Darksword!
We are glad to hear that you are having fun! For more info and community support, please also consider joining our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/9qMkwaPFhh

reviews.review_description: The game would be amazing if the turning movement was fluid like the tutorial video. The teleport left right can’t spin around with the left analog stick is annoying and takes away most of the fun when in combat

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Darksword!
As you pointed out, the basic movement on the left analog stick only provides strafe moves while turning is bound on the right analog stick. We will indeed see if there are more similar feedback like yours that warrants a reconfiguration.
